sentences.target: Im Winter trage ich meinen warmen Mantel.
sentences.reading: /ɪm ˈvɪntɐ ˈtʁaːɡə ɪç ˈmaɪ̯nən ˈvaʁmən ˈmantl̩/

translations.de: Im Winter trage ich meinen warmen Mantel.
translations.ipa: /ɪm ˈvɪntɐ ˈtʁaːɡə ɪç ˈmaɪ̯nən ˈvaʁmən ˈmantl̩/
translations.en: In winter, I wear my warm coat.
translations.es: En invierno llevo mi abrigo grueso.
translations.fr: En hiver, je porte mon manteau chaud.
translations.it: In inverno indosso il mio cappotto caldo.
translations.pt: No inverno eu uso meu casaco grosso.
translations.vi: Vào mùa đông, tôi mặc áo khoác ấm.
translations.nl: In de winter draag ik mijn warme jas.
translations.uk: Взимку я ношу своє тепле пальто.
translations.hi: सर्दियों में मैं अपना गर्म कोट पहनता हूँ।
translations.el: Τον χειμώνα φοράω το ζεστό μου παλτό.
translations.nb: Om vinteren bruker jeg den varme frakken min.
translations.id: Saat musim dingin, saya memakai mantel hangat.
translations.sv: På vintern har jag på mig min varma rock.
translations.cs: V zimě nosím svůj teplý kabát.
translations.da: Om vinteren har jeg min varme frakke på.
translations.ja: 冬は暖かいコートを着ます。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of the preposition 'in' + definite article 'dem' (in dem); governs dative; here introduces a temporal adverbial ('in winter').
Common noun; dative singular as object of 'im' (temporal setting).
Finite main verb; present tense, 1st person singular; verb-second position.
Personal pronoun; nominative singular; subject of 'trage'.
Possessive determiner; masculine accusative singular, agreeing with 'Mantel'.
Attributive adjective; masculine accusative singular, agrees with 'Mantel'.
Common noun; masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'trage'.
Definite article; masculine nominative singular, marking the subject.
Common noun; masculine nominative singular; subject.
Copular auxiliary; present tense, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate.
Degree adverb; intensifies the adjective 'kalt'.
Predicative adjective; predicate complement with the copula 'ist'.

sentences.target: Im Winter trinkt Anna gern heißen Kakao.
sentences.reading: /ɪm ˈvɪntɐ tʁɪŋkt ˈana ɡɛʁn ˈhaɪ̯sən kaˈkaʊ̯/

translations.de: Im Winter trinkt Anna gern heißen Kakao.
translations.ipa: /ɪm ˈvɪntɐ tʁɪŋkt ˈana ɡɛʁn ˈhaɪ̯sən kaˈkaʊ̯/
translations.en: In winter, Anna likes hot cocoa.
translations.es: A Anna le gusta el chocolate caliente en invierno.
translations.fr: En hiver, Anna aime le chocolat chaud.
translations.it: In inverno a Anna piace la cioccolata calda.
translations.zh-Hans: 冬天安娜喜欢喝热巧克力。
translations.yue: 冬天安娜鍾意飲熱朱古力。
translations.pt: No inverno, Anna gosta de chocolate quente.
translations.vi: Vào mùa đông, Anna thích ca cao nóng.
translations.ar: في الشتاء تحب آنا الكاكاو الساخن.
translations.nl: In de winter houdt Anna van warme chocolademelk.
translations.hu: Télen Anna szereti a forró kakaót.
translations.hi: सर्दियों में अन्ना को गरम कोको पसंद है।
translations.el: Τον χειμώνα η Άννα αγαπάει το ζεστό κακάο.
translations.nb: Om vinteren liker Anna varm kakao.
translations.id: Saat musim dingin, Anna suka cokelat panas.
translations.sv: På vintern gillar Anna varm kakao.
translations.ro: Annei îi place cacao fierbinte iarna.
translations.cs: V zimě má Anna ráda horké kakao.
translations.da: Om vinteren kan Anna godt lide varm kakao.
translations.ja: 冬にアンナはホットココアが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; governs dative; temporal adverbial ('in winter').
Common noun; dative singular as complement of 'im'.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person singular; verb-second position.
Proper noun; feminine name; nominative singular subject of 'trinkt'.
Adverb of preference; indicates that the action is liked ('likes to').
Attributive adjective; strong inflection, masculine accusative singular, modifying 'Kakao' (no article present).
Common noun; masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'trinkt'.

sentences.target: Wir fahren im Winter nicht ans Meer.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈfaːʁən ɪm ˈvɪntɐ nɪçt ans meːɐ̯/

translations.de: Wir fahren im Winter nicht ans Meer.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈfaːʁən ɪm ˈvɪntɐ nɪçt ans meːɐ̯/
translations.en: We don't go to the sea in winter.
translations.es: En invierno no vamos al mar.
translations.fr: En hiver, nous n'allons pas à la mer.
translations.it: In inverno non andiamo al mare.
translations.ru: Зимой мы не ездим на море.
translations.pt: No inverno, não vamos à praia.
translations.vi: Vào mùa đông, chúng tôi không đi biển.
translations.ar: في الشتاء لا نذهب إلى البحر.
translations.nl: In de winter gaan we niet naar zee.
translations.uk: Взимку ми не їдемо до моря.
translations.hi: सर्दियों में हम समुद्र नहीं जाते हैं।
translations.el: Τον χειμώνα δεν πάμε στη θάλασσα.
translations.nb: Om vinteren drar vi ikke til havet.
translations.id: Saat musim dingin, kami tidak pergi ke laut.
translations.sv: På vintern åker vi inte till havet.
translations.da: Om vinteren tager vi ikke til havet.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative plural; subject.
Finite main verb; present tense, 1st person plural.
Contraction of 'in dem'; governs dative; temporal adverbial.
Common noun; dative singular as complement of 'im'.
Negation particle; sentential negator for 'fahren'.
Contraction of the preposition 'an' + article 'das' (an das); governs accusative here (direction).
Common noun; neuter accusative singular as complement of 'ans' (directional goal).
